issue_title: fix(side-sheet): add background, add width prop
issue_body_preview:
## Description

<!-- Talk about the great work you've done! -->

### What's included?

<!-- List features included in this PR -->

- fix background of side-sheet
- add width prop

#### Test Steps

<!-- Add instructions on how to test your changes -->

- [ ] `npm run start`
- [ ] npm
test_description_zh: 打开 side-sheet 组件，观察其背景样式是否正确显示，并验证通过设置 width 属性能否改变 side-sheet 的宽度。
expected_result_zh: 1. side-sheet 打开后应具有正确的背景颜色/样式（非透明或缺失背景）；2. 通过 width 属性可以自定义 side-sheet 的宽度，设置不同的 width 值后，side-sheet 的宽度应相应变化并正确渲染。
